sentences.translation: Čovjek je polako i mirno jeo obrok.
sentences.translationEn: The man ate his meal slowly and calmly.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَنْظُرْ إِلَى هَاتِفِهِ أَثْنَاءَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Nije gledao u telefon za vrijeme jela.
sentences.translationEn: He did not look at his phone while eating.

sentences.arabic: تَمَتَّعَ بِكُلِّ لُقْمَةٍ وَشَكَرَ اللَّهَ عَلَى الرِّزْقِ.
sentences.translation: Uživao je u svakom zalogaju i zahvalio Allahu na opskrbi.
sentences.translationEn: He enjoyed every bite and thanked God for the provision.

sentences.translation: Rekao je: Mirno jedenje je bolje za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Calm eating is better for health.
